members.title: Profiles of Quality of Life Outcomes Observed in Rehabilitation Patients Using Latent Profile Analysis.
members.titleZh: 康复患者生活质量结局模式的潜在类别分析

members.title: Association Between Postoperative Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test Scores and Length of Hospital Stay in Patients with Chronic Subdural Hematoma: A Prospective Cohort Study.
members.titleZh: 慢性硬膜下血肿患者术后 Mini-BESTest 评分与住院时间之间的关联：一项前瞻性队列研究。

members.title: Reducing Recidivism After Traumatic Brain Injury: Results from the Reentry Continuum for Brain Injury (RCBI) Trial
members.titleZh: 减少创伤性脑损伤后的再犯：脑损伤再融入连续体（RCBI）试验的结果

items.title: Smartphone-Based Semi-Immersive Virtual Reality Enhances Upper Extremity Function in Subacute Stroke: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (n=60) found that smartphone-based semi-immersive virtual reality, when augmented with conventional physical therapy, significantly enhanced upper extremity function in individuals with subacute stroke compared to conventional therapy alone.
items.curatedReason: 这项RCT证明了智能手机虚拟现实辅助康复对亚急性期卒中上肢功能恢复的有效性。在传统物理治疗基础上引入低成本、半沉浸式VR，能显著增强患者康复效果，这是值得你考虑的低成本技术补充方案。
items.titleZh: 智能手机半沉浸式虚拟现实改善亚急性期卒中上肢功能：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（n=60）发现，与单独的传统物理治疗相比，智能手机半沉浸式虚拟现实结合传统物理治疗显著改善了亚急性期卒中患者的上肢功能。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT demonstrated the effectiveness of smartphone-based virtual reality-assisted rehabilitation for upper extremity function recovery in subacute stroke. Introducing low-cost, semi-immersive VR to traditional physical therapy can significantly enhance patient rehabilitation outcomes, making it a viable low-cost technological supplement for your consideration.

items.title: Effectiveness of passive vs. assistive robotic gait training on functional recovery and neuroplasticity post-stroke: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (n=48) found that assistive robotic gait training was more effective than passive robotic gait training in improving lower limb motor function recovery and neuroplasticity in subacute stroke patients.
items.curatedReason: 这项RCT对比了被动与辅助机器人步态训练对亚急性卒中患者功能恢复和神经可塑性的影响。结果显示，辅助模式在改善下肢运动功能和促进神经重塑方面优于被动模式，为你选择机器人辅助康复方案提供了明确依据。
items.titleZh: 被动与辅助机器人步态训练对卒中后功能恢复和神经可塑性的疗效：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（n=48）发现，辅助机器人步态训练在改善亚急性卒中患者下肢运动功能恢复和神经可塑性方面，优于被动机器人步态训练。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT compared the effects of passive versus assistive robotic gait training on functional recovery and neuroplasticity in subacute stroke patients. Results showed that the assistive mode was superior to the passive mode in improving lower limb motor function and promoting neural remodeling, providing clear evidence for your choice of robot-assisted rehabilitation programs.

items.title: The Effect of Duration of Supervised Rehabilitation on Outcomes Following Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction: A Systematic Review.
items.summary: This systematic review aims to elucidate associations between the duration of supervised rehabilitation and functional outcomes, as well as re-injury risk, following anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction (ACLR).
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述强化了ACL重建术后康复持续时间对结局的重要性。临床上你需要评估患者是否完成了足够的康复疗程，尤其是高强度、结构化的部分，这可能直接影响再损伤风险和功能恢复。
items.titleZh: 监督康复持续时间对前交叉韧带重建术后结局的影响：一项系统综述
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述旨在阐明监督康复持续时间与前交叉韧带重建（ACLR）术后功能结局及再损伤风险之间的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review reinforces the importance of rehabilitation duration on outcomes after ACLR. Clinically, you need to assess whether patients have completed sufficient rehabilitation sessions, especially high-intensity, structured components, as this can directly affect re-injury risk and functional recovery.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Dry needling and muscle mechanical properties in myofascial trigger points: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials concluded that dry needling can effectively improve myofascial mechanical properties in adults with active or latent myofascial trigger points.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和Meta分析表明，干针疗法能改善肌筋膜触发点患者的肌肉力学特性。这为干针作为一种有效手段提供了更坚实的证据，你可以更自信地将其纳入临床实践，尤其是在改善肌肉僵硬和弹性方面。
items.titleZh: 干针疗法与肌筋膜触发点肌肉力学特性：一项系统综述和Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项对随机对照试验进行的系统综述和Meta分析得出结论，干针疗法能有效改善伴有活动性或潜伏性肌筋膜触发点的成人患者的肌筋膜力学特性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis indicates that dry needling improves muscle mechanical properties in patients with myofascial trigger points. This provides stronger evidence for dry needling as an effective modality, allowing you to integrate it into clinical practice with more confidence, especially for improving muscle stiffness and elasticity.
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: The impact of a brief online education intervention on the knowledge, attitudes and beliefs of qualified physiotherapists about chronic low back pain: Pre- and post-intervention survey.
items.summary: A brief online education intervention significantly improved qualified physiotherapists' knowledge, attitudes, and beliefs about chronic low back pain in a pre- and post-intervention survey.
items.curatedReason: 在线教育干预对物理治疗师慢性腰痛知识、态度和信念有显著短期改善。但研究只关注认知层面，缺乏对实际临床行为改变或患者结局的衡量，提示其在实践中的长期有效性仍需更多证据。
items.titleZh: 在线教育干预对物理治疗师慢性腰痛知识、态度和信念影响：干预前后调查
items.summaryZh: 一项对合格物理治疗师进行的调查显示，简短的在线教育干预显著改善了他们对慢性腰痛的知识、态度和信念。
items.curatedReasonEn: Online education significantly improved physiotherapists' knowledge, attitudes, and beliefs regarding chronic low back pain in the short term. However, the study focused solely on cognitive changes, lacking measures of actual clinical behavior change or patient outcomes, indicating that long-term effectiveness in practice still requires further evidence.
items.journal: The South African journal of physiotherapy

items.title: Physiotherapist-related barriers and enablers to the implementation of high-value physiotherapy for chronic pain: a scoping review and narrative synthesis of 37 studies.
items.summary: A scoping review identified physiotherapist-related barriers and enablers to implementing high-value physiotherapy for chronic pain across 37 studies, aligning them with the Theoretical Domains Framework.
items.curatedReason: 本综述识别了物理治疗师在慢性疼痛高价值治疗实施中的障碍和促成因素。这些发现为制定行为改变策略提供了理论框架，可指导诊所和医院层面提升慢性疼痛物理治疗质量。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗师实施慢性疼痛高价值物理治疗的障碍与促成因素：37项研究的范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述梳理了37项研究，识别了物理治疗师在慢性疼痛高价值物理治疗实施中的障碍和促成因素，并将其与理论领域框架对齐。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review identified barriers and enablers for physiotherapists in implementing high-value treatments for chronic pain. These findings provide a theoretical framework for developing behavior change strategies, guiding clinics and hospitals to improve the quality of chronic pain physiotherapy.

items.title: Are There Sex Disparities in Return to Sport After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction? A Systematic Review and Exploratory Meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and exploratory meta-analysis investigated sex disparities in return-to-sport (RTS) outcomes after anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction (ACLR), noting potentially lower RTS rates in female athletes.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和Meta分析探讨了ACL重建术后重返运动的性别差异。数据显示女性再损伤率和重返运动率可能与男性不同，你需要在康复计划中考虑这些性别特异性因素，并为女性运动员提供更精细的风险管理。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建术后重返运动是否存在性别差异？一项系统综述和探索性Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和探索性Meta分析调查了前交叉韧带重建（ACLR）术后重返运动（RTS）结局的性别差异，指出女性运动员的RTS率可能较低。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis explores sex disparities in return to sport after ACL reconstruction. Data suggest that re-injury rates and return-to-sport rates may differ between females and males. You need to consider these sex-specific factors in rehabilitation plans and provide more detailed risk management for female athletes.
items.journal: The American journal of sports medicine

items.title: Functional stratification reveals speed-independent gait impairments beyond chronological age.
items.summary: Stratifying older adults by functional status using the Short Physical Performance Battery revealed speed-independent gait impairments, suggesting functional age is a better indicator than chronological age for detecting early impairments.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明，通过功能状态而非年龄对老年人进行分层，能揭示独立于步速的步态障碍。这意味着在评估老年患者时，你应更侧重其功能表现，而非简单以年龄划分，以早期发现并干预步态问题。
items.titleZh: 功能分层揭示独立于步速的步态障碍，超越生理年龄限制
items.summaryZh: 通过使用简易体能表现量表（SPPB）按功能状态对老年人进行分层，揭示了独立于步速的步态障碍，表明功能年龄是检测早期损伤的更好指标，而非实际年龄。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study indicates that stratifying older adults by functional status rather than chronological age reveals gait impairments independent of speed. This means that when assessing older patients, you should focus more on their functional performance than simply categorizing by age, to detect and intervene on gait issues early.

items.title: Evolving Demographics and Injury Characteristics of US Traumatic Spinal Cord Injury, 1972-2024.
items.summary: A cross-sectional analysis of the US Spinal Cord Injury Model Systems (SCIMS) database (n=37,866) revealed evolving demographic and injury characteristics of traumatic spinal cord injury cases from 1972 to 2024.
items.curatedReason: 这项基于SCIMS数据库的横断面分析揭示了美国创伤性脊髓损伤（tSCI）患者人口统计学和损伤特征的长期演变。这些趋势能帮助你更准确地了解当前tSCI患者群体特点，从而优化康复资源配置和干预策略。
items.titleZh: 1972-2024年美国创伤性脊髓损伤人口统计学和损伤特征演变
items.summaryZh: 对美国脊髓损伤模型系统（SCIMS）数据库（n=37,866）进行的横断面分析显示，1972年至2024年创伤性脊髓损伤病例的人口统计学和损伤特征正在演变。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional analysis based on the SCIMS database reveals long-term trends in demographic and injury characteristics of traumatic spinal cord injury (tSCI) patients in the US. These trends can help you better understand the current tSCI patient population, thereby optimizing rehabilitation resource allocation and intervention strategies.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: Mandatory genetic testing in sport: World Athletics and World Boxing repeat the discredited mistakes of the past
items.summary: World Athletics and World Boxing implemented mandatory SRY gene testing for female category participation, sparking controversy and raising ethical concerns.
items.curatedReason: 世界田径和世界拳击强制性SRY基因检测引发争议。这一政策可能对运动员的心理和社会福祉产生重大影响，你需要关注这类政策的伦理考量及其对运动员整体健康的影响，而非仅仅关注生理表现。
items.titleZh: 强制性基因检测在体育领域：世界田径和世界拳击重蹈过去 discredited 的覆辙
items.summaryZh: 世界田径和世界拳击对女性参赛者实施强制性SRY基因检测，引发争议并提出伦理担忧。
items.curatedReasonEn: Mandatory SRY gene testing by World Athletics and World Boxing has sparked controversy. This policy could significantly impact athletes' psychological and social well-being, and you need to consider the ethical implications of such policies and their effects on athletes' overall health, rather than just physiological performance.

items.title: Goal attainment scaling for patients with chronic low back pain receiving physical therapist care: a feasibility and reliability study.
items.summary: A feasibility and reliability study found Goal Attainment Scaling (GAS-Back) to be a feasible and reliable tool for chronic low back pain patients receiving physical therapist care, capable of capturing individualized patient goals.
items.curatedReason: 目标达成量表（GAS）在慢性腰痛患者的物理治疗中显示出可行性和可靠性。在临床实践中，可以考虑将GAS作为一种以患者为中心、捕捉个体化康复目标实现情况的补充评估工具。
items.titleZh: 慢性腰痛患者接受物理治疗时目标达成量表（GAS）的可行性与可靠性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项可行性和可靠性研究发现，目标达成量表（GAS-Back）对于接受物理治疗的慢性腰痛患者是可行且可靠的工具，能够捕捉个体化的患者目标。
items.curatedReasonEn: Goal Attainment Scaling (GAS) demonstrated feasibility and reliability in physical therapist care for chronic low back pain patients. In clinical practice, consider GAS as a patient-centered, supplementary assessment tool to capture the achievement of individualized rehabilitation goals.

items.title: Profiles of Quality of Life Outcomes Observed in Rehabilitation Patients Using Latent Profile Analysis.
items.summary: Latent profile analysis identified distinct patterns of quality of life outcomes in a diverse group of rehabilitation patients, including those with traumatic brain injury and spinal cord injury.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究通过潜在类别分析识别了不同康复患者群体中生活质量结局的共同模式。这提示你可以在制定治疗计划时，根据患者特定的生活质量特征，进行更精准的康复干预，而不仅仅是诊断。
items.titleZh: 康复患者生活质量结局模式的潜在类别分析
items.summaryZh: 潜在类别分析在一组多元康复患者（包括创伤性脑损伤和脊髓损伤患者）中识别出了不同的生活质量结局模式。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study identified common patterns in quality of life outcomes across diverse rehabilitation patient groups using latent profile analysis. This suggests that when developing treatment plans, you can implement more precise rehabilitation interventions based on patients' specific quality of life characteristics, rather than solely on diagnosis.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Profiles of Quality of Life Outcomes Observed in Rehabilitation Patients Using Latent Profile Analysis

items.title: Prevalence of knee pain and factors influencing its risk in ambulatory chronic stroke survivors.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study of 212 ambulatory chronic stroke survivors in Vietnam found a high prevalence of knee pain, with gait alterations after stroke potentially contributing to its occurrence.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对越南卒中幸存者的横断面研究指出，步态异常与膝关节疼痛普遍相关。在评估和治疗卒中患者时，你应常规筛查膝关节疼痛并识别潜在的步态生物力学因素，以提高康复质量。
items.titleZh: 慢性卒中幸存者膝关节疼痛的患病率及影响因素
items.summaryZh: 一项针对越南212名慢性卒中幸存者的横断面研究发现，膝关节疼痛患病率高，卒中后步态改变可能是其发生的原因之一。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study on Vietnamese stroke survivors indicates a common association between gait abnormalities and knee pain. When assessing and treating stroke patients, you should routinely screen for knee pain and identify potential gait biomechanical factors to improve rehabilitation quality.

items.title: Barriers and facilitators to leisure-time physical activity among individuals with spinal cord injury in China: A qualitative study.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored the barriers and facilitators to leisure-time physical activity among 20 community-dwelling adults with spinal cord injury in China, using the COM-B model.
items.titleZh: 中国脊髓损伤患者休闲体育活动障碍与促成因素：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究采用COM-B模型，探索了中国20名社区脊髓损伤成年人参与休闲体育活动的障碍和促成因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study reveals barriers and facilitators to leisure-time physical activity among individuals with spinal cord injury in China. These findings can help you design more culturally and socially appropriate interventions to enhance physical activity levels for SCI patients in China.

items.title: Healthcare professionals' perception of prevalence and assessment of mental ill-health in stroke patients with and without aphasia - a national survey.
items.summary: A national survey in Sweden investigated healthcare professionals' perceptions of mental ill-health prevalence and assessment in stroke patients, highlighting challenges in identifying issues, especially in those with aphasia.
items.curatedReason: 这项全国性调查揭示了瑞典医疗专业人员对卒中患者精神健康问题的认知和评估现状。即便伴有失语症，精神健康问题仍普遍存在，你需要在临床实践中提高筛查意识，并争取跨专业协作以应对沟通挑战。
items.titleZh: 瑞典卒中患者（伴或不伴失语症）精神疾病患病率与评估的全国性调查
items.summaryZh: 一项瑞典全国性调查研究了医疗专业人员对卒中患者（伴或不伴失语症）精神疾病患病率和评估的看法，强调了识别这些问题的挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: This national survey sheds light on Swedish healthcare professionals' perceptions and assessments of mental ill-health in stroke patients. Even with aphasia, mental health issues are prevalent, and you need to increase screening awareness in clinical practice and seek interprofessional collaboration to address communication challenges.

items.title: National survey of stroke rehabilitation services in Indonesia.
items.summary: A cross-sectional online survey (June-August 2023) described sub-acute stroke rehabilitation service provision in Indonesia, assessing service characteristics including staffing, session frequency, duration, and insurance coverage.
items.curatedReason: 这项调查描述了印度尼西亚卒中康复服务的现状。它为你了解区域性康复服务特点（包括人员配置、治疗频率、持续时间和保险覆盖）提供了宝贵数据，为当地实践改进和政策制定提供依据。
items.titleZh: 印度尼西亚卒中康复服务全国调查
items.summaryZh: 一项2023年6月至8月进行的横断面在线调查描述了印度尼西亚亚急性卒中康复服务的提供情况，评估了包括人员配置、治疗频率、持续时间和保险覆盖在内的服务特征。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey describes the current status of stroke rehabilitation services in Indonesia. It provides valuable data for you to understand regional rehabilitation service characteristics, including staffing, treatment frequency, duration, and insurance coverage, offering a basis for local practice improvement and policy formulation.

items.title: Accelerometry-derived physical activity following Achilles tendon rupture: A prospective cohort study.
items.summary: A prospective cohort study (n=42) investigated accelerometry-derived physical activity during the first year after Achilles tendon rupture, finding activity levels often remained below normal.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性队列研究量化了跟腱断裂后一年的身体活动水平。你需要认识到，患者活动量在受伤后一年内仍可能低于正常，这提示你应在康复后期继续鼓励并监测患者的物理活动水平。
items.titleZh: 跟腱断裂后身体活动加速度计测量：一项前瞻性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性队列研究（n=42）调查了跟腱断裂后第一年通过加速度计测量的身体活动，发现活动水平通常低于正常。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective cohort study quantified physical activity levels one year after Achilles tendon rupture. You need to recognize that patient activity levels may remain below normal for up to a year post-injury, suggesting you should continue to encourage and monitor patients' physical activity levels throughout late-stage rehabilitation.

items.title: Rehabilitation Protocols Following Patellar Instability Surgery: A Structured Review of Published Recommendations and AI Generated Guidance.
items.summary: A structured review compared published postoperative rehabilitation protocols for patellar instability surgery with guidance generated by artificial intelligence platforms.
items.curatedReason: 这项结构化综述评估了髌骨不稳手术后的康复方案，并首次与AI生成的指南进行对比。AI在现有数据整合上表现出潜力，但你目前仍应以循证医学指南为核心，警惕AI建议的局限性和滞后性。
items.titleZh: 髌骨不稳手术后康复方案：已发表建议与AI生成指南的结构化综述
items.summaryZh: 一项结构化综述比较了髌骨不稳手术后已发表的康复方案与人工智能平台生成的指导意见。
items.curatedReasonEn: This structured review evaluated rehabilitation protocols after patellar instability surgery and, for the first time, compared them with AI-generated guidance. While AI shows potential in integrating existing data, you should still prioritize evidence-based medical guidelines and be wary of AI recommendations' limitations and lag.

items.title: Lung Boost Trainer Versus Incentive Spirometer on Pulmonary Function Post COVID Hemiplegic Cerebral Palsy Children; Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial compared the efficacy of a Lung Boost Trainer versus an incentive spirometer on pulmonary function in COVID-19 hemiplegic cerebral palsy children, finding the former potentially more effective.
items.curatedReason: 这项RCT比较了“肺部增强训练器”与吸气训练器对脑瘫儿童肺功能的影响。对于COVID-19后的偏瘫脑瘫儿童，肺部增强训练可能比传统吸气训练器提供更好的肺功能改善，你可以在临床中考虑其作为一种潜在干预。
items.titleZh: 肺部增强训练器与吸气训练器对COVID偏瘫脑瘫儿童肺功能的影响：随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验比较了肺部增强训练器与吸气训练器对COVID-19偏瘫脑瘫儿童肺功能的疗效，发现前者可能更有效。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT compared the effects of a 'lung boost trainer' versus an incentive spirometer on pulmonary function in children with cerebral palsy. For post-COVID-19 hemiplegic cerebral palsy children, lung boost training might offer better pulmonary function improvement than traditional incentive spirometers; you can consider it as a potential intervention in clinical practice.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Community-Based Resistance Intensive Personal Training (RIPT) Program for Youth with Cerebral Palsy: A Prospective Cohort Pilot Study.
items.summary: A prospective cohort pilot study evaluated a 12-week community-based resistance intensive personal training (RIPT) program for youth with cerebral palsy, showing positive effects on goal performance, satisfaction, gross motor function, and anaerobic capacity.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性队列预试验表明，社区力量训练项目对脑瘫青少年在目标表现、满意度、粗大运动功能和无氧能力方面有积极影响。你可以参考其干预模式，将个性化、社区导向的力量训练融入脑瘫儿童康复计划。
items.titleZh: 社区阻力强化个性化训练（RIPT）项目对脑瘫青少年的影响：一项前瞻性队列预试验
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性队列预试验评估了针对脑瘫青少年的为期12周的社区阻力强化个性化训练（RIPT）项目，结果显示其对目标表现、满意度、粗大运动功能和无氧能力有积极影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective cohort pilot study indicates that a community-based resistance intensive personal training (RIPT) program positively impacts goal performance, satisfaction, gross motor function, and anaerobic capacity in youth with cerebral palsy. You can refer to its intervention model and integrate personalized, community-oriented strength training into rehabilitation plans for children with cerebral palsy.

items.title: Cardiac care of athletes with disabilities: are we prepared to adapt?
items.summary: This commentary highlights the lack of comprehensive cardiac care guidelines and research for athletes with disabilities, despite their increasing participation in high-intensity sports.
items.curatedReason: 残疾运动员越来越多地参与高强度运动，但针对他们的心脏护理指南和研究严重不足。你需要在评估残疾运动员时，意识到现有心脏筛查和管理策略的局限性，并呼吁更多研究以填补空白。
items.titleZh: 残疾运动员的心脏护理：我们准备好适应了吗？
items.summaryZh: 这篇评论强调，尽管残疾运动员越来越多地参与高强度运动，但针对他们的全面心脏护理指南和研究仍严重不足。
items.curatedReasonEn: Athletes with disabilities are increasingly participating in high-intensity sports, yet cardiac care guidelines and research for them are severely lacking. When assessing athletes with disabilities, you need to be aware of the limitations of existing cardiac screening and management strategies, and advocate for more research to fill these gaps.

items.title: SRY gene screening in elite Athletics: rationale, science and implementation of the World Athletics Regulations
items.summary: This article discusses the rationale, science, and implementation of World Athletics' SRY gene screening regulations for elite female athletes, aiming to maintain a biological sex category.
items.curatedReason: 这篇述评解释了世界田径在精英级别比赛中实施SRY基因筛查的理由和科学依据。虽然其旨在维护“女性生物学类别”的公平性，但你仍需认识到这类政策在执行中可能带来的伦理挑战和实际影响。
items.titleZh: 精英田径运动员SRY基因筛查：世界田径条例的理由、科学和实施
items.summaryZh: 本文讨论了世界田径针对精英女性运动员SRY基因筛查条例的理由、科学依据和实施情况，旨在维护生物学性别类别。
items.curatedReasonEn: This commentary explains the rationale and scientific basis for World Athletics' implementation of SRY gene screening in elite competitions. While it aims to maintain fairness in the 'female biological category,' you still need to be aware of the ethical challenges and practical implications that such policies may bring during implementation.

items.title: Make or break: psychotropic medications have off-label effects on neuromuscular performance
items.summary: This commentary discusses how psychotropic medications, despite their benefits for mental health, can have off-label effects on athletes' neuromuscular performance, impacting training and recovery.
items.curatedReason: 这篇述评强调了精神药物对运动员神经肌肉表现的非标签效应。作为康复师，你需要了解常用精神药物可能对运动员体能产生的影响，这对于制定个性化的训练和康复计划至关重要。
items.titleZh: 成败之间：精神药物对神经肌肉表现的非标签效应
items.summaryZh: 这篇评论讨论了精神药物尽管对心理健康有益，但可能对运动员的神经肌肉表现产生非标签效应，从而影响训练和康复。
items.curatedReasonEn: This commentary highlights the off-label effects of psychotropic medications on athletes' neuromuscular performance. As a rehabilitation specialist, you need to understand how common psychotropic medications can impact athletic performance, which is crucial for developing personalized training and rehabilitation plans.

items.title: Rehabilitation Utilizing Blood Flow Restriction Following Surgical Repair of a Bankart Lesion with a Buford Complex in an Elite High School Football Player: A Case Report.
items.summary: A case report details rehabilitation utilizing blood flow restriction following surgical repair of a Bankart lesion with a Buford complex in an elite high school football player.
items.curatedReason: 这份病例报告探索了Bankart损伤伴Buford复合体精英高中橄榄球运动员术后血流限制（BFR）康复。BFR在特定人群和病理中仍是探索性干预，此报告提供了小样本可行性，但离常规实践尚远。
items.titleZh: 精英高中橄榄球运动员Bankart损伤伴Buford复合体修复术后血流限制康复：病例报告
items.summaryZh: 一份病例报告详细介绍了精英高中橄榄球运动员Bankart损伤伴Buford复合体修复术后采用血流限制（BFR）的康复情况。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case report explores postoperative blood flow restriction (BFR) rehabilitation for an elite high school football player with a Bankart lesion and Buford complex. BFR remains an exploratory intervention in specific populations and pathologies; this report offers small-sample feasibility, but is far from routine practice.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Exploring psychological flexibility processes in adults with spinal cord injury: a qualitative study.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored the lived experiences of psychological flexibility and its processes among individuals with spinal cord injury, linking it to better mental health.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究探索了脊髓损伤成年人的心理灵活性过程，虽然它与更好的心理健康相关，但你仍需要将这些概念转化为可操作的干预策略，以提升患者依从性和康复效果。
items.titleZh: 探索脊髓损伤成年人的心理灵活性过程：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究探索了脊髓损伤个体心理灵活性及其过程的亲身经历，将其与更好的心理健康联系起来。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study explores psychological flexibility processes in adults with spinal cord injury. While linked to better mental health, you still need to translate these concepts into actionable intervention strategies to enhance patient adherence and rehabilitation outcomes.

items.title: Early Neuromuscular and Co-activation Patterns After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction In Males: A Case-control Exploratory Feasibility Study.
items.summary: An exploratory feasibility study in males quantified early (within 2 weeks) neuromuscular and co-activation patterns after anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction (ACLR), highlighting arthrogenic muscle inhibition and hamstring co-activation.
items.curatedReason: 这项探索性可行性研究量化了ACL重建术后早期神经肌肉抑制（AMI）和襻绳肌共激活模式。你应关注术后早期四头肌AMI和过度襻绳肌共激活，这些是影响早期康复进展的潜在因素，但此小样本研究无法提供实践改变级证据。
items.titleZh: 男性前交叉韧带重建术后早期神经肌肉与共激活模式：一项病例对照探索性可行性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对男性的探索性可行性研究量化了前交叉韧带重建（ACLR）术后早期（2周内）的神经肌肉和共激活模式，突出了关节源性肌肉抑制和襻绳肌共激活。
items.curatedReasonEn: This exploratory feasibility study quantified early neuromuscular inhibition (AMI) and hamstring co-activation patterns after ACL reconstruction. You should be aware of early postoperative quadriceps AMI and excessive hamstring co-activation, as these are potential factors affecting early rehabilitation progress, though this small-sample study cannot provide practice-changing evidence.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Ischemic preconditioning alters gait mechanics in older adults with knee osteoarthritis.
items.summary: A study (n=30) found that a single session of ischemic preconditioning altered gait mechanics in older adults with knee osteoarthritis, though mechanisms and long-term effects remain to be explored.
items.curatedReason: 一项针对膝骨关节炎老年患者的研究发现，一次性缺血预处理（IPC）能改变步态生物力学。尽管机制尚不明确且为小样本短期效应，但其作为辅助手段值得探索，别急于将其推广到常规临床。
items.titleZh: 缺血预处理改变膝骨关节炎老年患者的步态力学
items.summaryZh: 一项研究（n=30）发现，单次缺血预处理改变了膝骨关节炎老年患者的步态力学，尽管其机制和长期效应仍有待探索。
items.curatedReasonEn: A study on older adults with knee osteoarthritis found that a single session of ischemic preconditioning (IPC) altered gait biomechanics. Although the mechanism is unclear and this is a small-sample, short-term effect, it is worth exploring as an adjunctive method. Do not rush to implement it into routine clinical practice.

items.title: Australasian College of Sport and Exercise Physicians edition: uncertainty in sport and exercise medicine
items.summary: The Australasian College of Sport and Exercise Physicians (ACSEP) Annual Scientific Conference in October 2026 will explore the theme of uncertainty in sport and exercise medicine.
items.curatedReason: 澳大利亚运动与运动医师学院（ACSEP）年度科学会议聚焦运动医学中的不确定性主题。这提醒你，运动康复领域仍有大量灰色地带，持续学习和批判性思维至关重要。
items.titleZh: 澳大利亚运动与运动医师学院版：运动与运动医学中的不确定性
items.summaryZh: 2026年10月，澳大利亚运动与运动医师学院（ACSEP）年度科学会议将探讨运动与运动医学中的不确定性主题。
items.curatedReasonEn: The Australasian College of Sport and Exercise Physicians (ACSEP) annual scientific conference focuses on uncertainty in sports medicine. This reminds you that significant gray areas still exist in sports rehabilitation, making continuous learning and critical thinking crucial.

items.title: Association Between Postoperative Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test Scores and Length of Hospital Stay in Patients with Chronic Subdural Hematoma: A Prospective Cohort Study.
items.summary: A prospective cohort study demonstrated an association between lower postoperative Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test (Mini-BESTest) scores and longer length of hospital stay in patients with chronic subdural hematoma.
items.curatedReason: Mini-BESTest 评分与慢性硬膜下血肿术后住院时间显著相关，该研究证实了其作为预测工具的潜力。这意味着你在临床中可以使用 Mini-BESTest 早期评估患者的平衡和步态功能，从而更好地预测康复路径和住院时长。
items.titleZh: 慢性硬膜下血肿患者术后 Mini-BESTest 评分与住院时间之间的关联：一项前瞻性队列研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性队列研究表明，慢性硬膜下血肿患者术后 Mini-BESTest 评分较低与住院时间延长存在关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: Mini-BESTest scores are significantly associated with length of hospital stay after chronic subdural hematoma surgery, confirming its potential as a predictive tool. This means you can use Mini-BESTest in clinical practice for early assessment of balance and gait function, better predicting rehabilitation pathways and hospital duration.

items.title: Reducing Recidivism After Traumatic Brain Injury: Results from the Reentry Continuum for Brain Injury (RCBI) Trial
items.summary: The Reentry Continuum for Brain Injury (RCBI) trial examined the effects of an intervention designed to support individuals with traumatic brain injury pending release from prison, focusing on recidivism and behavioral outcomes.
items.curatedReason: RCBI 试验旨在减少 TBI 患者出狱后的再犯率，如果结果积极，这可能意味着你需要在脑损伤康复中，更早地介入社会融入和行为干预，以帮助患者成功重返社会，降低再犯风险。
items.titleZh: 减少创伤性脑损伤后的再犯：脑损伤再融入连续体（RCBI）试验的结果
items.summaryZh: 脑损伤再融入连续体（RCBI）试验旨在检验一项旨在支持创伤性脑损伤患者出狱的干预措施的效果，重点关注再犯率和行为结果。
items.curatedReasonEn: The RCBI trial aims to reduce recidivism rates for TBI patients post-release. If successful, this could imply that you need to intervene earlier with social integration and behavioral interventions in brain injury rehabilitation to help patients successfully re-enter society and reduce re-offense risks.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation
